entries.fixture: Sporting Kansas City vs New York Red Bulls
entries.pick: double-sided: Kansas City + NY Red Bulls
entries.final_score: Sporting Kansas City 1-2 New York Red Bulls
entries.lesson: Good selection and live read: NYRB triggered 2UP and the match reached 2-1 comeback pressure, but the trigger team still won, so there was no 2UP profit. This is a high-quality near miss, not a dead pick.
entries.notes: Settled from user-confirmed final score and QL. Rory only got on the NYRB side/position live, but this row records the intended double-sided MLS test. Actual QL/net P&L recorded as -£2.50 from Rory's settlement.
